в•‘  STATUS LIFECYCLE DOCUMENTATION                                            в•‘
в•‘                                                                            в•‘
в•‘  Every entry (in entries.json) and submission (in this file) follows one   в•‘
в•‘  of three mutually-exclusive statuses:                                     в•‘
в•‘                                                                            в•‘
в•‘  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ                         в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ PENDING   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ VERIFIED  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ DISPUTED  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶ (resolved)         в•‘
в•‘  в”Ӯ (default  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ (publishedв”Ӯ     в”Ӯ (flagged  в”Ӯ     or re-verified)      в•‘

в•‘  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                         в•‘
в•‘                         в”Ӯ                                                   в•‘

в•‘                    в”Ӯ (no longerв”Ӯ       entry kept for audit trail           в•‘

в•‘                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                                            в•‘
в•‘                                                                            в•‘
в•‘  STATUS DEFINITIONS:                                                       в•‘
в•‘  вҖў PENDING   вҖ” New submission awaiting review. Not yet published.          в•‘
в•‘  вҖў VERIFIED   вҖ” Reviewed and confirmed against at least one trusted        в•‘
в•‘                 source. Published in entries.json. CORRESPONDS TO          в•‘
в•‘                 entries.json "verified": true. This is the implicit         в•‘
в•‘                 default status for all live entries.                        в•‘
в•‘  вҖў DISPUTED   вҖ” Entry has been challenged (by submitter, company, or       в•‘
в•‘                 third party). Remains in entries.json but flagged.          в•‘
в•‘                 May be resolved back to VERIFIED or escalated to RETRACTED.в•‘
в•‘  вҖў RETRACTED  вҖ” Entry has been definitively proven incorrect or the        в•‘
в•‘                 company has retracted its statement. PRESERVED in           в•‘
в•‘                 entries.json with "verified": false for full audit trail.   в•‘
в•‘                 Excluded from active statistics and timeline.               в•‘
в•‘                                                                            в•‘
в•‘  IMPLICIT STATUS RULE (for entries.json):                                  в•‘
в•‘  Every entry in entries.json implicitly has status VERIFIED unless         в•‘
в•‘  explicitly marked DISPUTED or RETRACTED. The existing "verified" boolean  в•‘
в•‘  maps as follows:                                                          в•‘
в•‘    вҖў "verified": true  вҶ’  status VERIFIED  (normal, published)             в•‘
в•‘    вҖў "verified": false вҶ’  check for explicit status field; if absent,       в•‘
в•‘                            treat as RETRACTED                               в•‘
в•‘                                                                            в•‘
в•‘  LIFECYCLE RULES:                                                          в•‘
в•‘  1. New submissions always start as PENDING.                               в•‘
в•‘  2. Only PENDING submissions can transition to VERIFIED.                   в•‘
в•‘  3. VERIFIED entries can be DISPUTED at any time.                          в•‘
в•‘  4. DISPUTED entries can resolve to VERIFIED or escalate to RETRACTED.     в•‘
в•‘  5. RETRACTED is terminal вҖ” entries are never deleted, only retracted.      в•‘
в•‘  6. All status transitions are logged with timestamp and reason.           в•‘
в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ
